name: toggle-group-spacing
visual_summary: A toggle-group-spacing is a container component used to group multiple toggle buttons for on/off functionality in a UI, useful for application settings or feature toggles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: toggle-group-spacing
Description: A toggle-group-spacing is a container component used to group multiple toggle buttons for on/off functionality in a UI, useful for application settings or feature toggles.
Style: e.g. compact
Interactions: e.g. animated, clickable
Tags: toggle, button, grouping

Requirements:

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation

- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
